examples: Both Signalling and user data may be subject to ciphering.
In data ciphering, it adopts improved ECC to cipher and decipher data.
Ciphering method, ciphering device, deciphering method and deciphering device.
Depending on where you sit, conclusions from all this ciphering can be exhilarating or depressing.
What I get out of all this ciphering is Amazon, financially, is a very powerful operator with minimal debt and near infinite working capital.
